response.objective_caption: A head-and-shoulders portrait of a figure with shoulder-length auburn hair, thin gold wire-rimmed rectangular glasses, turquoise eyes, and red lipstick, wearing multiple gold chain necklaces against a solid black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A head-and-shoulders portrait of a figure with shoulder-length auburn hair, thin gold wire-rimmed rectangular glasses, turquoise eyes, and red lipstick, wearing multiple gold chain necklaces against a solid black background. The skin across the face and neck is rendered with severely absent, smeared texture, completely lacking pores and fine surface detail, which produces a waxy, plastic-like, mannequin-esque quality.
